acf.short_information:
[Blue] Railway Recruitment Cell (RRC-CR-Mumbai), [/Blue] 
Has Released A Notification On ** Official Website ** For The Recruitment Of RRC CR Apprentice Post.
[red] This Recruitment Is For 51 Positions. [/red]
**RRC Application Form ** Has Started On ** 10 March 2026 ** & The Candidates Can Apply Till The 
[red] 09 April 2026. [/red]
Candidates Must Check The Complete Details For ** RRC CR Apprentice Recruitment 2026. ** Which Has Given Below.

table_header.red: Railway RRC CR Apprentice Online Form 2026
table_header.green: Railway RRC CR Apprentice Examination 2026 : Short Details

acf.important_dates:
Online Apply Start Date : ** 10 March 2026 **
Online Apply Last Date : [red] 09 April 2026 [/red]
Last Date For Fee Payment : ** 09 April 2026 **
Merit List : ** Notify Later **
[red] Candidates Are Advised To Confirm From The RRC CR Official Website. [/red]
acf.right_column_details:
For ** General/OBC/EWS : ₹ 100/- **
For ** SC/ST/PH Female : ₹ 00/- **
** Payment Mode (Online) : ** You Can Make The Payment Using The Following Methods :
Debit Card
Credit Card
Internet Banking
IMPS
Cash Card / Mobile Wallet
acf.age_limit:
Minimum Age : ** 15 Year **
Maximum Age : ** 24 Year **
** Railway ** Provides Age Relaxation For The ** Railway RRC CR Apprentice ** Position As Per Their Regulations.
acf.eligibility: Candidates Must Have Passed Class 10th (High School ) With At Least 50% Marks And Hold An ITI Certificate In The Relevant Trade.
acf.how_to_steps:
Interested Candidates Who Wish To Apply For The RRC CR Post Can Submit Their Application Online Form Before [red] 09 April 2026. [/red]
Use The Click Here Link Provided Below Under Important Link Section To Apply Directly.
Alternatively, Go To The ** Official Website Of RRC CR ** To Complete The Application Process Online.
Make Sure To Complete The Application Before The Deadline [red] 09 April 2026. [/red]
[red] Note – छात्रो से ये अनुरोध किया जाता है की वो अपना फॉर्म भरने से पहले Official Notification को ध्यान से जरूर पढे उसके बाद ही अपना फॉर्म भरे । (Last Date, Age Limit, &  Education Qualification) [/red]
acf.faq:
Question : What Will The RRC CR Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Start Online Application Form?
Answer : Started On ** 10 March 2026. **

Question : What is The RRC CR Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Last Online Application Form?
Answer : Last Date ** 09 April 2026. **

Question : What Is The Age Limit For ** RRC CR Apprentice 2026 ** ?
Answer : The Age Limit For **RRC CR Apprentice 2025 ** Is As Follows On Official Website.

Question : What Is The Eligibility For ** RRC CR Apprentice Vacancy 2026 ** ?
Answer : Candidate Must Have Passed Class 10th With At Least 50% Marks And Hold An ITI Certificate In The Relevant Trade.

Question : What Is The Official Website For RRC CR?
Answer : ** Https://Rrccr.Com/
acf.important_links:
